warnings: No canonical override log exists in this repo; override_evidence_count remains 'unknown' rather than being substituted by 0.
MET does not own override evidence. Once CDE/GOV declare an override-log artifact, this intake record will read from it and update evidence_status accordingly.
evidence_status='absent' is honest unknown framing; it does not infer override_evidence is rare or impossible.
failure_prevented: Override evidence shape staying ambiguous: pure blindness or fabricated entries; override count being silently reported as 0; evidence_status being inferred from missing data.
signal_improved: Override intake exposes evidence_status (absent|partial|present|unknown), override_evidence_count is an honest unknown, and a paired POL-CDE-OVERRIDE-AUDIT signal proposes the missing log shape.
next_recommended_input: Forward POL-CDE-OVERRIDE-AUDIT to CDE/GOV. Once a canonical override log artifact exists, this intake record will read from it and surface evidence_status='partial' or 'present' based on per-override coverage.

intake_shape_recommendation.rationale: These fields let MET intake an override entry without inferring approval or enforcement; canonical owners (CDE/GOV) keep the underlying record authoritative.
